title: Ukrainians Cautiously Welcome Trump’s Announcement About Patriot Missile Systems
summary_full: President Trump said the United States would license Ukraine to produce Patriots, which can intercept ballistic missiles. But it could be months or years before those are ready.
summary_public: President Trump said the United States would license Ukraine to produce Patriots, which can intercept ballistic missiles. But it could be months or years before those are ready.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: license Ukraine to produce Patriots, which can intercept ballistic missiles
